# Diagram Checklist

## Use Case Diagram
- Actors identified (admin, jury, participant/system actors)
- System boundary shown
- Use cases mapped to real features

## Use Case Scenarios
- Preconditions, main flow, postconditions
- Alternate/exception flows where relevant

## Class Diagram
- Core classes/entities and key fields
- Associations and multiplicities

## Sequence Diagram
- Lifelines map to actual components
- Message ordering reflects runtime logic

## Activity Diagram
- Start/end nodes, decisions, loops
- Workflow reflects true session lifecycle

## Collaboration Diagram
- Numbered message interactions
- Object links and dependencies shown

## Package Diagram
- High-level module/package dependencies
- Directionality is accurate

## Deployment Diagram
- Runtime nodes/containers/services
- Network and storage links shown

## DFD Level 0
- Context process + external actors + major flows

## DFD Level 1
- Decomposed core processes + data stores

## DFD Level 2
- Detailed decomposition of one critical process

## ER Diagram
- Entities, PK/FK, cardinalities
- Junction tables represented correctly
